name: json-viewer-tree-inspector
description: View JSON/dict files as an interactive, expandable IDE debugger-style variable-inspector tree.

jsonViewer.expandLevel.description: JSON files: expand the tree to this level when opened (root = level 0). 0 shows top-level entries collapsed; 1 expands them one level.

jsonViewer.expandLevelJsonl.description: JSONL/NDJSON files: expand the tree to this level when opened (root = level 0). 0 lists the records collapsed.

jsonViewer.liveUpdate.description: Re-parse and refresh the viewer as the underlying document changes.

jsonViewer.largeFileThresholdMb.description: Local .json, .jsonl, and .ndjson files at or above this size use large-file mode to avoid VS Code's extension document sync limit. Set to 0 to always use large-file mode for supported local files, or a negative value to disable it.

jsonViewer.largeFilePreviewEntries.description: Large-file mode: maximum number of top-level JSON/JSONL entries to parse and render in one visible range.

jsonViewer.largeFileMaxCopyMb.description: Large-file mode: maximum value size that can be copied from source text in one action.

jsonViewer.largeFileSourcePreviewKb.description: Large-file mode: source bytes to read around a value when using Jump to source.
